creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
in message <20080220190023.199F616A582@hub.freebsd.org>,
wrote Edwin Groothuis thusly...
>
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Data-Swap,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/120897 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120897

If it looks ok, please go ahead with the patch ... that reminds me
to relinquish maintainership of this port.


  - Parv

--
